source: Library of Congress, Prints & Photographs Division
artist: Unknown photographer (LoC Miscellaneous Items in High Demand)
license: No known restrictions on publication (public domain — pre-1928)
title: Alaska glacier with steamship — illustrating glacial carving of Southeast Alaska fjords
description: Circa 1900 photograph of an Alaska tidewater glacier with an early expedition steamship for scale, illustrating the kind of glacial process that carved Misty Fjords' signature 3,000-foot granite walls more than 17,000 years ago. The same retreating ice that formed the granite canyons of Misty Fjords National Monument also formed the adjacent Glacier Bay fjord system to the north.
alt: Circa-1900 black-and-white photograph of a tidewater glacier in Alaska with a small expedition steamship in the foreground for scale
